flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwestern Michigan College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (19.7% → 14.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Michigan College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern Michigan College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.6k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwestern Michigan College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
